name: fullframe_animation
description: Generate a full-frame projection animation from a surface image using Kling video generation, subtract the background, and preview the simulated view.

surface_image.description: URL or path to the prepared projection surface image (with non-reflective regions blacked out).

prompt.description: Creative prompt describing the desired animation/motion.

steps.description: Generate a cinematic video from the surface image using Kling v3.
Remove the static surface background to extract only the animated additive light content.
Preview the projection on the actual surface.
